MISSION TRAIL: AVIATION INTEGRATION V2.1

You are the Lead Integration Technician.

Work through the fiscal year, complete UHLE, AHLE, and A2GC, and survive real hangar problems: parts shortages, continuity failures, drawing conflicts, burnout, QA findings, and leadership demos.
